hooks.command: file=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$file" in *data/adapted/*) echo 'data/adapted/ is generated by the structurize bot and will be overwritten on the next pipeline run. Edit data/input/resume.md (source of truth) or data/fitted/{slug}.md (human-editable tailoring) instead.' >&2; exit 2 ;; esac
